content: Knight-Captain Cade: So this is the infamous Piper Wright... I’ve read your “articles.” Porn and propaganda wrapped in Synth-lovin’ rhetoric. Bet you’d suck a toaster if it whispered socialist sweet nothings. Piper: Oh please, tin-can. I’ve seen Brotherhood fanboys jerk off to Maxson’s recruitment holos more times than I’ve taken MJR’s cock—and that’s saying something. How’s that vow of chastity working out? Or do you just fuck your power armor when no one’s looking? Knight-Captain Cade: At least we have discipline. Not like your “free love” anarchy where raiders fuck ghouls in the streets. Saw one of your Railroad pals last week—tied up, begging for a Super Mutant’s knot. Real progressive. Piper: Better than your fascist “purity” bullshit. MJR says your so-called “medical exams” are just excuses to grope recruits. Bet you get off on those “decontamination showers,” huh? Fucking hypocrite.

Knight-Captain Cade: Tch—your kind always distracts from the real rot in the Commonwealth. Jet-fueled orgies don’t rebuild civilization. But keep screeching about oppression while feral ghouls eat your neighbors. Piper: Oh, speaking of —bet the smell in your tin cans is worse than downtown after a raider gangbang. Enjoy your little fascist boys’ club. MJR’s already got me brainstorming our next  exposé: Brotherhood Patrols—Compensating for Something?
